en: The teacher is here.

ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: mo maiuemo maitan’e, te tosvo ho hucma, tato nʉthʉ mimiyo!
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧!
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!
Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: te maiuteu ho hucma, tato peispak’i no mali ho atavei no cohzona ho hucma!
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧!
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!

ab: cuma na tako hioa ho hucma?
en: What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: te maikayo ho hucma, temia yuyuso ’o ino ho uhne kiokai.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: mi’o mici teavto, te’o uhne tote’ia.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: lema’cohio, mo congo ’e bʉyo’u, te’o uhne tote’ia.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，我要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?

ab: tec’u mon’i tosvo, totea na’a hocu uhne’e.
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: lema’cohio, mo na’no congo co fnguu’u, te’o m’ea tosvo no atatvei no cohzona.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: lema’cohio, ta’u m’ea tosvo ho tena maiucni, ta’u poa aitneni to leaotothomʉ.
ch: A:老師，我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is paicʉ?

ab: mo congo ’o bʉyosi, mo yone tote’za.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is pasuya?

ab: mo, congo ’o vihi to pasuya, mo m’ea tosvo maitan’e.
en: Teacher, pasuya has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.
Why didn’t yangui come?
She has a fever.
